basic_details.job_title: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Resident, TMC Fellowship Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC)
basic_details.short_information: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) Senior Resident / 01 Year TMC Fellowship Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website actrec.gov.i. A total of not mentioned vacancies (multiple posts as per requirement) have been announced under the ACTREC Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 40 years (Relaxable by 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC & 10 years for Physically Handicapped)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for Physically Handicapped candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/DNB (Anaesthesiology) or Equivalent PG Degree for Senior Resident. For Fellowship, MD/DNB (Anaesthesiology) or (Internal Medicine) or (Emergency Medicine) or (Chest Medicine) or MD (Anaesthesiology) Or Equivalent PG Degree.
qualification.details: Senior Resident (Anaesthesia & Critical Care and Pain): MD/DNB (Anaesthesiology) Or Equivalent PG Degree. 01 Year TMC Fellowship in Onco Critical Care: MD/DNB (Anaesthesiology) or (Internal Medicine) or (Emergency Medicine) or (Chest Medicine). 01 Year TMC Fellowship in Onco Anaesthesia and Pain: MD/DNB (Anaesthesiology) or (Internal Medicine) or (Emergency Medicine) or (Chest Medicine). 01 Year TMC Fellowship in Onco Anaesthesia, Critical Care and Pain: MD (Anaesthesiology) Or Equivalent PG Degree. 01 Year TMC Fellowship in Gastrointestinal and Hepato-Pancreato-Billiary Anaesthesia: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility details.

salary_details.details: Senior Resident: Rs.1,33,623/- p.m. (Gross Pay) 01 Year TMC Fellowship: Rs.1,45,530/- p.m. (Gross Pay)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ACTREC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ACTREC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download ACTREC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Senior Resident (Anaesthesia & Critical Care and Pain): MD/DNB (Anaesthesiology) Or Equivalent PG Degree. 01 Year TMC Fellowship in Onco Critical Care: MD/DNB (Anaesthesiology) or (Internal Medicine) or (Emergency Medicine) or (Chest Medicine). 01 Year TMC Fellowship in Onco Anaesthesia and Pain: MD/DNB (Anaesthesiology) or (Internal Medicine) or (Emergency Medicine) or (Chest Medicine). 01 Year TMC Fellowship in Onco Anaesthesia, Critical Care and Pain: MD (Anaesthesiology) Or Equivalent PG Degree. 01 Year TMC Fellowship in Gastrointestinal and Hepato-Pancreato-Billiary Anaesthesia: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility details.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 40 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for Physically Handicapped candidates.

content_sections.heading: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Senior Resident: Rs.1,33,623/- p.m. (Gross Pay) 01 Year TMC Fellowship: Rs.1,45,530/- p.m. (Gross Pay)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the ACTREC Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of ACTREC to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ACTREC recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the ACTREC Senior Resident / 01 Year TMC Fellowship posts is 14th July 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Senior Resident post?
faq.answer: For the Senior Resident position, candidates must possess an MD/DNB in Anaesthesiology or an equivalent PG degree. Please check the official notification for any further specific requirements.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all posts is 40 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST, OBC, and Physically Handicapped candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the ACTREC recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official ACTREC website. You will need to fill out the application form, upload necessary documents, and pay the application fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for the ACTREC recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee for all categories is Rs. 1000/-. This fee is payable online during the application process.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident and Fellowship posts?
faq.answer: The Senior Resident post offers a gross pay of Rs. 1,33,623/- per month. For the 01 Year TMC Fellowship, the gross pay is Rs. 1,45,530/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee mentioned is Rs. 1000/- for all categories. Please refer to the official notification for any specific exemptions or details regarding application fees.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these positions?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves an MCQ Test, if applicable, followed by an Interview. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for precise details.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page. It is highly recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is contract-based. Candidates should review the terms and conditions of the contract in the official notification.
